turns.speaker: interviewer
turns.text: Welcome to AI and Insurance Weekly, covering the week of April fifteenth. We are tracking two big stories today: a new frontier model and a claims pilot at a major US carrier.

turns.speaker: amtrust
turns.text: Right. The headline on the model side is Anthropic's Claude Opus 4.7, which extends effective context and reports better tool-use reliability in its model card.

turns.speaker: amtrust
turns.text: Progressive is piloting AI-driven first-notice-of-loss triage. The aim is to route complex losses faster while keeping humans in the decision loop.

turns.speaker: interviewer
turns.text: That is all for this week. See you next Friday.
